title: Numbers, Days & Months
description: Learn numbers 1-100, days of the week, months, and how to talk about time and dates.
descriptionTr: 1'den 100'e sayılar, haftanın günleri, aylar ve tarih/saat konuşma.

vocabulary.extra: One coffee, please.

vocabulary.example: There are two cats in the garden.
vocabulary.extra: I need two tickets for the movie.

vocabulary.example: I work five days a week.
vocabulary.extra: The store closes at five o'clock.

vocabulary.example: There are ten students in the class.
vocabulary.extra: I'll be there in ten minutes.
The book costs twenty dollars.

vocabulary.example: There are one hundred pages in this book.
vocabulary.extra: We have about a hundred customers every day.
vocabulary.extraTr: Her gün yaklaşık yüz müşterimiz oluyor.

vocabulary.extra: Monday is always busy at the office.
We have a team meeting every Friday.
What are you doing this weekend?

vocabulary.example: January is the first month of the year.
vocabulary.extra: My birthday is in January.

vocabulary.example: There are twelve months in a year.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Bir yılda on iki ay var.
vocabulary.extra: I started this job last month.
I have worked here for two years.
What is the date today?
See you tomorrow at 9 o'clock!
I didn't sleep well yesterday.
When is your birthday?
The meeting starts at ten o'clock.
I don't have time right now.

vocabulary.example: There are seven days in a week.
vocabulary.extra: I go to the gym three times a week.
vocabulary.extraTr: Haftada üç kez spor salonuna giderim.

vocabulary.extra: The date of the meeting is March 15th.

grammar.title: Numbers, Time & 'How many / How old'
grammar.titleTr: Sayılar, Zaman ve 'Kaç tane / Kaç yaşında' Soruları
grammar.explanation: In English, we use 'How many' to ask about quantity, 'How old' for age, and 'What time' for the clock. Numbers: one, two, three... For tens: twenty, thirty, forty... For compound numbers: twenty-one (21), thirty-five (35).
grammar.explanationTr: İngilizce'de 'How many' miktar, 'How old' yaş, 'What time' saat sormak için kullanılır. Birleşik sayılar: twenty-one (21), thirty-five (35) şeklinde tire (-) ile yazılır.
table: There are a hundred people here.

tips.tr: 11 ve 12 özel isimler: eleven, twelve — ezberle!
13-19 arası -teen ile biter (ama dikkat: thirteen, fifteen!)
Onluklar -ty ile biter (ama dikkat: forty, NOT fourty!)

tips.en: Days & months ALWAYS start with a CAPITAL letter
tips.tr: Günler ve aylar İngilizce'de HER ZAMAN büyük harfle başlar

tips.en: In + month: My birthday is in April
tips.tr: Ay için 'in' kullanılır: in January, in March

tips.en: On + day: I work on Monday
tips.tr: Gün için 'on' kullanılır: on Monday, on Friday

tips.en: At + time: The meeting is at 3 o'clock

reading.text:
My name is Ayşe. I am twenty-three years old. My birthday is on March 15th.

I work at a small e-commerce company in Istanbul. I go to work from Monday to Friday. My day starts at nine o'clock. I have lunch at twelve thirty. I finish work at six o'clock in the evening.

On Tuesdays and Thursdays, I have English class after work. There are fifteen students in my class. Our teacher is American.

On the weekend, I like to read books and go shopping. I have about thirty books at home! My favorite month is June because the weather is beautiful and my best friend's birthday is on June 20th.

This year, I want to learn three hundred new English words!
reading.textTr:
Benim adım Ayşe. Yirmi üç yaşındayım. Doğum günüm 15 Mart'ta.

İstanbul'da küçük bir e-ticaret şirketinde çalışıyorum. Pazartesi'den Cuma'ya işe giderim. Günüm saat dokuzda başlar. Öğle yemeğimi on iki buçukta yerim. Akşam altıda işi bitiririm.

Salı ve Perşembe günleri işten sonra İngilizce dersim var. Sınıfımda on beş öğrenci var. Öğretmenimiz Amerikalı.

Hafta sonu kitap okumayı ve alışverişe gitmeyi severim. Evde yaklaşık otuz kitabım var! En sevdiğim ay Haziran çünkü hava güzel ve en iyi arkadaşımın doğum günü 20 Haziran'da.

Bu yıl üç yüz yeni İngilizce kelime öğrenmek istiyorum!

questions.question: What time does she start work?
Which days does she have English class?

fillBlanks.sentence: There are ___ days in a week.
There are ___ months in a year.
___ is the first day of the work week.
___ is the last month of the year.

sentenceOrder.correct: I work five days a week

translation.turkish: Bir yılda on iki ay var.
translation.english: There are twelve months in a year.
acceptAlso: There are 12 months in a year

dialog.title: At the Registration Office
dialog.context: Eyüp yeni bir İngilizce kursuna kaydoluyor. Sekreter bilgilerini soruyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good morning! Welcome to English Academy. How can I help you?
lines.textTr: Günaydın! English Academy'ye hoş geldiniz. Nasıl yardımcı olabilirim?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Good morning! I want to register for an English class.
lines.textTr: Günaydın! Bir İngilizce sınıfına kaydolmak istiyorum.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Of course! What is your full name?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Great. Which days do you prefer for class? We have Monday-Wednesday or Tuesday-Thursday.
lines.textTr: Harika. Ders için hangi günleri tercih edersiniz? Pazartesi-Çarşamba veya Salı-Perşembe var.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Tuesday and Thursday, please. What time is the class?
lines.textTr: Salı ve Perşembe, lütfen. Ders saat kaçta?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: The class is at seven o'clock in the evening. There are twelve students in the group.
lines.textTr: Ders akşam saat yedide. Grupta on iki öğrenci var.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Perfect! That works for me. How much is it per month?
lines.textTr: Mükemmel! Bana uyar. Aylık ne kadar?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: It's two hundred dollars per month. Your first class starts next Tuesday.
lines.textTr: Ayda iki yüz dolar. İlk dersiniz gelecek Salı başlıyor.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you very much! See you on Tuesday!

questions.question: Which days will Eyüp have class?
How much does the class cost?
